hooks.prompt: This tool is about to write or edit a Python file that may contain agent code. Check if the code follows ADK conventions and best practices. Alert the user about any critical issues before the write happens.

The Claude Code session has started with the ADK Skills plugin enabled. Check if required environment variables (GOOGLE_API_KEY at minimum) are configured. If not, suggest that the user run /adk:config to set up required credentials. This helps users get started quickly.
